stories: Good morning Sean, it's Sunday, the twenty-fourth of May 2026.
Here's a fact to start the day: frogs fluoresce.
Many species glow under blue or ultraviolet light — greens and yellows invisible to the naked eye in daylight.
Makes you wonder what else is hiding in plain sight.
Family calendar note: Zain has taekwondo from ten to eleven this morning, then the main event — Zain's birthday party from two until seven at bowling and swimming.
A genuine milestone for neurosurgery here.
Russia launched a large-scale missile and drone attack on Kyiv overnight.
Damage reported across several districts — one of the heavier strikes in recent weeks.
Good morning Sean, it's Sunday, the twenty-fourth of May 2026
Here's a fact to start the day: on this exact date in 1844, Samuel Morse sent the very first telegraph message, from Washington D
The words he chose were "What hath God wrought
" Given everything that has happened in communications since, that question seems more apt than ever
Your calendar is clear today - a free Sunday ahead
In Singapore, Dr Koh Poh Koon resigned as Senior Minister of State on Friday, stepping down from his Manpower and Health portfolios effective June the first
He said publicly he has been an absent husband, father and son since entering politics in 2015, and his family needs him now in a way that is not compatible with the demands of public office
It is a rare and candid statement about the personal cost of political life
